description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Autorelease that triggers on push to the master branch. Run a windows-latest job that sets up MSYS2 with a specific set of tools, checks out the repository, builds the project with a custom make command, zips certain executables and a hex file, tags the release as 'dev', deletes old 'fluxengine.zip' assets from the 'dev' release, and then releases the zipped file as a 'Development build' with the tag 'dev'.
